name: JonDeTech Sensors AB (publ)
summary: JonDeTech Sensors AB (publ) engages in the research and development of IR sensors. It offers thermopiles for use in the mobile industry, as well as in IOT and energy efficiency and safety applications, such as consumer electronics, green technology, medtech, smart homes, and connected cities. The company has an agreement with OFILM Group Co., Ltd. for the development of presence detection module in laptops. JonDeTech Sensors AB (publ) was founded in 2008 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
